title: Kirish & Maqsadli Stack
mtitle: 0 dan professional darajagacha: yo'l xaritasi
lede: Bu platforma seni WebGIS Engineer holatdan to'liq Geospatial Full-Stack Engineer darajasiga olib chiqadi. Pastdagi bo'limlar xaritaning zoom darajalari kabi tartiblangan - eng katta ko'rinishdan (asoslar) eng nozik detallargacha (deploy va portfolio).
doc:
Maqsad bitta jumlada: React + TypeScript + MapLibre frontend, Python FastAPI API, PostgreSQL/PostGIS database, GDAL/Shapely/Rasterio/YOLO processing va Docker/Nginx/Redis deploy ni bitta production geospatial platformaga yig'ish.

Maqsadli stack (target stack)

React + TypeScript + ViteMapLibre GL JS Python + FastAPIPostgreSQL + PostGIS GDAL / Shapely / RasterioYOLO Docker ComposeNginx + Redis

Frontend xarita va UI uchun React/TypeScript ishlatiladi. Backendning asosiy API qismi Python/FastAPI bo'ladi, chunki geospatial processing, raster/vector pipeline va AI inference Python ekotizimida kuchli. PostGIS spatial database, MapLibre browserdagi xarita, Docker/Nginx/Redis esa production infratuzilma vazifasini bajaradi.

Bo'limlar (zoom darajalari)

Har bir bo'lim - xaritada bir zoom darajasi. Yuqoriroq daraja = chuqurroq detal:

z3 / React TS + MapLibre z6 / FastAPI backend z10 / PostGIS z13 / Vector tiles z16 / Docker & deploy z28 / GIS processing z30 / AI-GIS

Har kuni qanday o'rganasan

Kuniga 2-3 soat ajratsang yetarli. Eng muhim qoida: o'qigan narsangni darhol o'z WebGIS loyihangga qo'sh.

30 daq / nazariya/docs 90 daq / kod yozish 30 daq / debugging 30 daq / README/note

Asosiy qaror

Kursning backend yo'li endi FastAPI + Python. Oldingi TypeScript backend flow asosiy yo'ldan olib tashlandi; geospatial va AI uchun Python/FastAPI ustuvor.

Butun tizim chizmasi

[Browser] React + TypeScript + MapLibre | | /api/search, /api/features, /api/upload v [FastAPI + Python] -----> [Redis cache / queue] | | | SQL / spatial query | background jobs v v [PostgreSQL + PostGIS] [GDAL / Rasterio / YOLO worker] | | vector tile source v [Tegola] ---- /tiles/{z}/{x}/{y}.pbf ----> [MapLibre]

Bu chizma kursdagi hamma modulning qayerga ulanishini ko'rsatadi: frontend xaritani boshqaradi, FastAPI API vazifasini bajaradi, PostGIS spatial data saqlaydi, worker esa og'ir processing va AI ishlarini bajaradi.

title: QGIS / OSM / Linux
mtitle: Real data va server asoslari
lede: Soxta massiv emas - haqiqiy O'zbekiston ma'lumoti bilan ishlaysan. Bu bo'limda OSM datasini yuklab olib, QGIS'da tayyorlab, PostGIS'ga import qilasan, va loyihani joylaydigan Linux serverning asoslarini o'rganasan.
doc:
Ko'p WebGIS dev faqat kod yozadi, lekin data qayerdan kelishini bilmaydi. Sen bu yerda kuchli bo'lsang - ajralib turasan. Bu bo'lim ikki qismdan: GIS data tayyorlash va Linux server asoslari.

O'rganadigan mavzular

OSM data (Geofabrik / Overpass)QGIS layerlar atribut / geometry fixCRS / EPSG (4326 ↔ 3857) osm2pgsql / ogr2ogrQGIS -> PostGIS
SSHapt / paketlarfayl tizimi ufw firewallsystemd / journalctlcron

OSM data qayerdan olinadi?

Geofabrik - butun davlat/viloyat ekstrakti (.osm.pbf). Katta hajmli umumiy data uchun. Overpass API / Turbo - aniq obyektlar uchun ("Toshkentdagi barcha kasalxonalar"). Aniq, kichik so'rovlar uchun.

QGIS ish jarayoni

QGIS - GIS'ning "Swiss army knife"i. Tipik oqim: 1) OSM/shapefile layerini och -> 2) atributlar va geometryni ko'r -> 3) kerakmas qismlarni filtrlab, buzuq geometryni tuzat -> 4) kerakli CRS'ga (4326) reproyeksiya qil -> 5) DB Manager yoki "Export -> PostGIS" orqali to'g'ridan-to'g'ri bazaga yoz.

CRS - eng ko'p uchraydigan tuzoq

Data noto'g'ri joyda chiqsa, deyarli har doim CRS sababli. PostGIS ichida hamma narsani 4326'da saqla, faqat tile uchun 3857'ga o'tkaz.

Linux - loyihang yashaydigan joy

Production server deyarli har doim Linux (Ubuntu). SSH bilan ulanish, paket o'rnatish, fayl tizimida harakatlanish, firewall (ufw) sozlash va service/log'larni boshqarish - bularsiz deploy bo'lmaydi. Chuqur Linux admin shart emas, lekin bu asoslar majburiy.

Bu bo'lim oxiridagi natija

Haqiqiy O'zbekiston OSM datasi tozalangan holda PostGIS'da, Tegola'ga tayyor, va sen uni Linux serverga joylay oladigan darajadasan.

title: Frontend / React TS
mtitle: Frontend - foydalanuvchi ko'radigan tomon
lede: Backend data beradi, lekin foydalanuvchi xaritani ko'radi. Bu bo'limda React + TypeScript + Vite asosida MapLibre xaritasini qurib, uni o'z API'ingga ulaysan va xarita harakatlanganda datani jonli yangilaysan.
doc:
Nega Vite? - u juda tez dev server beradi va React + TypeScript shablonini bir buyruq bilan tayyorlaydi. Sening React TS tajribang bu yerda to'g'ridan-to'g'ri ishlaydi.

O'rganadigan mavzular

Vite + React + TSkomponentlar useRef / useEffectMapLibre GL JS map lifecyclevector + geojson source bbox refreshsearch + flyTopopup

MapLibre vs Leaflet - qachon qaysi biri?

MapLibre GL JS - vector tiles, WebGL/GPU, 3D, silliq uzluksiz zoom. Sening Tegola pipeline'ing uchun aynan shu kerak - million obyektni GPU'da render qiladi. Leaflet - raster tiles, oddiyroq API, ulkan plugin ekotizimi, lekin native vector tile va WebGL yo'q. Tez prototip yoki oddiy marker xaritasi uchun yaxshi.

Diqqat: koordinata tartibi

MapLibre [lng, lat] tartibini kutadi, Leaflet esa [lat, lng]. Eng ko'p uchraydigan xato shu - marker noto'g'ri joyda chiqsa, avval shuni tekshir.

Map komponenti tuzilishi

Xarita DOM'ga bir marta yaratiladi va React qayta render qilganda qayta yaratilmasligi kerak. Shuning uchun useRef (DOM va map obyekti uchun) + useEffect (yaratish va tozalash uchun) ishlatiladi.

Bu bo'lim oxiridagi natija

Vector tile (Tegola) + API GeoJSON (FastAPI) ikkalasini ko'rsatadigan, xarita harakatlanganda bbox bo'yicha yangilanadigan, qidiruv va popup'li interaktiv WebGIS frontend.

deck.gl va Three.js - katta hajmli va 3D vizualizatsiya

MapLibre va Leaflet oddiy xarita uchun yetadi. Lekin millionlab nuqta yoki 3D kerak bo'lsa - WebGL kutubxonalari ishga tushadi (bular asosan frontend qismi):

deck.glUber'ning WebGL data-viz qatlamlari: millionlab nuqta/yo'l, heatmap, hexagon - MapLibre ustiga qo'yiladi
Three.jsumumiy 3D dvigatel (WebGL): 3D bino, sahna, model. React'da react-three-fiber (R3F) bilan

Qaysi birini?

Oddiy xarita -> MapLibre/Leaflet. Katta hajmli geodata qatlamlari -> deck.gl. Umumiy 3D (xaritasiz model/sahna) -> Three.js. deck.gl ko'pincha MapLibre bilan birga ishlaydi.

title: Python for JS/TS Devs
mtitle: Python poydevori - JavaScript/TypeScript biladiganlar uchun
lede: Bu modul Python'ni noldan, lekin JS/TS biladigan dasturchi ko'zi bilan tushuntiradi. Maqsad: FastAPI, PostGIS, GDAL, Rasterio va YOLO modullariga kirishdan oldin Python sintaksisi, typing, venv, pip, async va fayl bilan ishlashni qo'lga olish.
doc:
Sen allaqachon JavaScript/TypeScript bilan ishlagansan. Shuning uchun Python'ni butunlay begona til sifatida emas, tanish tushunchalarning boshqa sintaksisi sifatida o'rganamiz: o'zgaruvchi, funksiya, array/list, object/dict, class, async, module va package.

JS/TS -> Python mosliklari

const / let -> name = value array -> list object -> dict interface/type -> dataclass yoki Pydantic model Promise/async -> async def / await npm package -> pip package package.json -> pyproject.toml yoki requirements.txt node_modules -> .venv fetch/api client -> httpx / requests JSON.parse -> json.loads

Nimani chuqur o'rganasan?

venvpiplist/dictfunctionclasstype hintsdataclassasync/awaitfile I/OJSON

Fokus

Python'ni umumiy dasturchilik uchun emas, geospatial backend va processing uchun o'rganasan. Shuning uchun birinchi mini mashqlar JSON, GeoJSON, fayl va API atrofida bo'ladi.

heading.p: Bir xil fikr, ikki xil yozilish.

code.title: syntax_compare.py
code.code:
# TypeScript:
# const user = { id: 1, name: 'Ali' }
# const names = users.map(u => u.name)

user = {"id": 1, "name": "Ali"}
users = [user, {"id": 2, "name": "Vali"}]
names = [u["name"] for u in users]

print(names)  # ['Ali', 'Vali']

heading.p: TypeScriptdagi tip fikrlash Python'da ham foydali.

code.title: typing_basics.py
code.code:
from typing import TypedDict

class Feature(TypedDict):
    id: int
    name: str
    geometry_type: str

def format_feature(feature: Feature) -> str:
    return f"{feature['id']} - {feature['name']} ({feature['geometry_type']})"

print(format_feature({"id": 1, "name": "Road A", "geometry_type": "LineString"}))

heading.p: Ma'lumot modelini toza saqlash.

code.title: dataclass_feature.py
code.code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Layer:
    id: str
    title: str
    geometry: str
    min_zoom: int = 0

layer = Layer(id="buildings", title="Buildings", geometry="Polygon", min_zoom=14)
print(layer.title)

heading.p: GIS processingning birinchi qadami.

code.title: read_geojson.py
code.code:
import json
from pathlib import Path

path = Path("data/sample.geojson")
fc = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))

print(fc["type"])
print("features:", len(fc["features"]))
for feature in fc["features"][:3]:
    print(feature["properties"].get("name"), feature["geometry"]["type"])

heading.p: JS Promise fikrini Python async bilan bog'lash.

code.title: async_example.py
code.code:
import asyncio

async def fetch_layer(layer_id: str) -> dict:
    await asyncio.sleep(0.1)  # network/db kutishni tasavvur qil
    return {"id": layer_id, "count": 120}

async def main():
    buildings, roads = await asyncio.gather(
        fetch_layer("buildings"),
        fetch_layer("roads"),
    )
    print(buildings, roads)

asyncio.run(main())

heading.p: Processing skriptlari uchun argument qabul qilish.

import json

parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()

args = parser.parse_args()

fc = json.loads(Path(args.file).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
print({"file": args.file, "features": len(fc.get("features", []))})

title: FastAPI backend asoslari
mtitle: FastAPI - geospatial backend poydevori
lede: Bu modulda backendning asosiy yo'li to'liq Python + FastAPI bo'ladi. Sen frontendga JSON/GeoJSON qaytarish, request validation, error handling va API fikrlashni amalda o'rganasan.
doc:
FastAPI - Python'da tez, tartibli va professional API yozish frameworki. Geospatial yo'nalishda u juda mos: PostGIS bilan ishlaydi, GDAL/Shapely/Rasterio pipelinega ulanadi, YOLO inference uchun Python ekotizimidan foydalanadi.

O'rganadigan mavzular

Python venvpipFastAPI uvicornPydanticGET / POST path/query paramsstatus kodlarerror handling

FastAPI yuragi

Route - URL eshigi. Pydantic schema - kiruvchi/chiqadigan ma'lumot shakli. Dependency - DB ulanish, auth yoki sozlamani endpointga toza berish usuli. Service function - biznes logika.

Modul oxiridagi natija

React frontend FastAPI'ga so'rov yuboradi -> FastAPI PostGIS yoki vaqtinchalik data'dan o'qiydi -> JSON/GeoJSON qaytaradi -> frontend uni map yoki panelda ko'rsatadi.

Har kuni bitta endpoint

Du: /health / Se: /layers / Cho: /features / Pay: POST /feedback / Ju: hammasini Swagger va Thunder Client'da test qil.

Request lifecycle chizmasi

React fetch('/api/features?bbox=...') -> Nginx /api route -> FastAPI route -> Pydantic validation -> Service function -> PostGIS query -> GeoJSON response -> MapLibre source.setData(...)

Backendni shunday o'ylasang osonlashadi: route so'rovni qabul qiladi, schema tekshiradi, service ishni bajaradi, response esa frontend uchun aniq formatda qaytadi.

title: PostgreSQL + PostGIS
mtitle: PostGIS - spatial database
lede: Oddiy API emas, mapping API yozasan. PostGIS PostgreSQL'ga spatial data saqlash, indexlash va query qilish imkonini qo'shadi - bu WebGIS backendning yuragi.
doc:
Endi massiv o'rniga haqiqiy spatial data bilan ishlaysan. Geometry (nuqta, chiziq, poligon), koordinata tizimlari (SRID) va spatial query'lar markaziy mavzu.

O'rganadigan mavzular

SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETEgeometry / geography SRID (4326)ST_TransformST_AsGeoJSON ST_IntersectsST_ContainsST_DWithin ST_MakeEnvelopeGIST indexEXPLAIN ANALYZE

Asosiy 3 ta API

BBOX - xaritada ko'rinayotgan to'rtburchak ichidagi obyektlar. Nearby - bir nuqtadan radius ichidagilar (ST_DWithin - index'dan foydalanadi, shuning uchun tez). Search - nom bo'yicha qidiruv.

SRID nima?

SRID - koordinata tizimi raqami. 4326 = oddiy lat/lng (GPS). 3857 = web xaritalar ishlatadigan metr asosidagi proyeksiya. ST_Transform bittasidan ikkinchisiga o'tkazadi.

2-oy oxiridagi natija

PostGIS'dan bbox bo'yicha GeoJSON olish, GIST index qo'yish, spatial query'ni EXPLAIN ANALYZE bilan optimizatsiya qilish va natijani map frontend'da ko'rsatish.

Tezlik siri: GIST index

Geometry ustunga GIST index qo'ymasang, har query butun jadvalni skanlaydi. Index bilan PostGIS faqat kerakli hududni ko'radi - minglab marta tez.

Spatial schema namunasi

layers id, title, geometry_type, min_zoom, max_zoom features id, layer_id, name, props JSONB, geom geometry(Geometry,4326) index: GIST(geom) uploads id, filename, status, created_at, error_message

Professional PostGIS loyihada faqat bitta jadval yetmaydi. Layer metadata, feature data, upload status va spatial indexlar alohida o'ylanadi.

GIST index: qanday YARATILADI va NEGA kerak

Spatial index oddiy B-tree emas - u geometriyalarni bounding box (MBR) bo'yicha daraxtga joylaydi. Shu sabab USING GIST majburiy. Sintaksis oddiy, lekin bir nechta nozik joyi bor:

CREATE INDEX ... USING GIST (geom) -> geometry ustuni uchun CREATE INDEX ... USING GIST (geog) -> geography uchun (metr, sfera) CONCURRENTLY -> jadval band bo'lganda bloklamay quradi ON ... USING GIST (geom) WHERE deleted -> qisman (partial) index

Index qurgandan keyin PostgreSQL statistikasini yangilash uchun ANALYZE ni ishlat - aks holda planner eski taxmin bilan noto'g'ri reja tanlashi mumkin.

Nozik joy: funksiya index'ni "yashiradi"

WHERE ST_Transform(geom,3857) && ... deb yozsang, index ustunga emas, funksiya natijasiga kerak bo'ladi va Seq Scan qaytadi. Yechim: so'rov tomonni transform qil (geom && ST_Transform(:env,4326)) yoki ifoda bo'yicha alohida index qur.

Spatial trigger: geometriyani avtomatik to'ldirish

Ko'p holatda lat/lng alohida ustunlarda keladi (masalan CSV import), yoki geometriya har o'zgarishda qayta hisoblanishi kerak (markaz nuqta, maydon). Buni qo'lda emas, trigger bilan qilinadi - shunda ma'lumot doim izchil bo'ladi.

Window function: spatial tahlilda reyting va zichlik

Window function ("oyna") qatorlar guruhi ustidan hisoblaydi, lekin qatorlarni yig'ib bitta qilib qo'ymaydi. Spatialda juda foydali: har tuman ichida binolarni balandligi bo'yicha reyting, yoki har nuqtaga eng yaqin N obyekt. ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ... ORDER BY ...) - asosiy shakl.

EXPLAIN ANALYZE: index'li va indekssiz taqqoslash

Optimizatsiyani his qilish uchun bitta so'rovni index bilan va indexsiz o'lchash kerak. Quyidagi kod bloklarida real benchmark ssenariysi keltirilgan - raqamlar misol uchun (mashina va datasetga qarab o'zgaradi), lekin nisbat (yuzlab-minglab marta farq) haqiqiy.

code.title: PostGIS yoqish + jadval
1. BBOX bo'yicha binolarni olish
code.code:
-- GET /api/buildings?bbox=minLng,minLat,maxLng,maxLat
SELECT
  id, name, height,
  ST_AsGeoJSON(geometry)::json AS geometry
FROM buildings
WHERE ST_Intersects(
  geometry,
  ST_MakeEnvelope($1, $2, $3, $4, 4326)
)
LIMIT 500;

code.title: 2. Nearby - radius ichidagilar (tez)
code.code:
-- GET /api/nearby?lng=69.24&lat=41.31&radius=500
SELECT id, name,
  ST_Distance(geometry::geography,
              ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint($1, $2), 4326)::geography) AS dist_m
FROM buildings
WHERE ST_DWithin(
  geometry::geography,
  ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint($1, $2), 4326)::geography,
  $3                                   -- metrda radius
)
ORDER BY dist_m
LIMIT 50;

code.title: 3. Nom bo'yicha qidiruv
code.code:
-- GET /api/search?q=Amir Temur
SELECT id, name, ST_AsGeoJSON(geometry)::json AS geometry
FROM buildings
WHERE name ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%'
LIMIT 20;

heading.p: bbox bo'yicha GeoJSON qaytarish.

code.title: features_service.py
code.code:
from sqlalchemy import text

BBOX_SQL = text("""
SELECT id, name, height, ST_AsGeoJSON(geometry)::json AS geometry
FROM buildings
WHERE ST_Intersects(geometry, ST_MakeEnvelope(:minx, :miny, :maxx, :maxy, 4326))
LIMIT 500;
""")

async def find_buildings_in_bbox(session, bbox: tuple[float, float, float, float]):
    minx, miny, maxx, maxy = bbox
    rows = await session.execute(BBOX_SQL, {"minx": minx, "miny": miny, "maxx": maxx, "maxy": maxy})
    return {
        "type": "FeatureCollection",
        "features": [
            {"type": "Feature", "geometry": r.geometry, "properties": {"id": r.id, "name": r.name, "height": r.height}}
            for r in rows
        ],
    }

heading.p: Har tuman ichida balandlik reytingi va zichlik.

code.title: window_functions.sql
code.code:
-- 1) Har tuman ichida binolarni balandligi bo'yicha reytingi
SELECT
  d.name AS tuman,
  b.name AS bino,
  b.height,
  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY d.id
    ORDER BY b.height DESC
  ) AS reyting
FROM buildings b
JOIN districts d
  ON ST_Contains(d.geom, b.geom)   -- fazoviy JOIN
ORDER BY d.name, reyting;

-- 2) Har tuman uchun umumiy soni ustunga qo'shib (agregatsiz)
SELECT
  d.name,
  b.name,
  COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY d.id)              AS tumanda_jami,
  b.height / AVG(b.height) OVER (PARTITION BY d.id) AS ortacha_ulush
FROM buildings b
JOIN districts d ON ST_Contains(d.geom, b.geom);

heading.p: Bitta so'rov, EXPLAIN ANALYZE bilan taqqoslash.

code.title: benchmark_index.sql
code.code:
-- SSENARIY: ~1.2M qatorli 'features' jadvali (OSM binolar, Toshkent).
-- Bitta bbox so'rovini index BOR va YO'Q holatda o'lchaymiz.

-- === A) INDEXSIZ ===
DROP INDEX IF EXISTS idx_features_geom;
ANALYZE features;

EXPLAIN ANALYZE
SELECT id, name
FROM features
WHERE geom && ST_MakeEnvelope(69.20, 41.28, 69.30, 41.34, 4326);

-- Taxminiy natija (misol uchun):
--   Seq Scan on features
--   (actual time=0.030..842.7 rows=5120 loops=1)
--   Planning Time: 0.2 ms
--   Execution Time: ~861 ms   <-- butun 1.2M qator skanlanadi

-- === B) INDEX'LI ===
CREATE INDEX idx_features_geom ON features USING GIST (geom);
ANALYZE features;

EXPLAIN ANALYZE
SELECT id, name
FROM features
WHERE geom && ST_MakeEnvelope(69.20, 41.28, 69.30, 41.34, 4326);

-- Taxminiy natija (misol uchun):
--   Index Scan using idx_features_geom on features
--   (actual time=0.055..4.1 rows=5120 loops=1)
--   Planning Time: 0.3 ms
--   Execution Time: ~6 ms     <-- faqat kerakli hudud o'qiladi

-- XULOSA: ~861 ms -> ~6 ms = qariyb 140x tez.
-- Katta datasetda bu farq minglab martaga yetadi.

title: Python FastAPI + PostGIS
mtitle: Python backend - FastAPI bilan geospatial API
lede: Chatdagi ish e'loniga yaqinlashish uchun backend asosiy yo'li Python FastAPI qilib belgilandi. Maqsad: PostGIS bilan gaplashadigan, GeoJSON qaytaradigan, upload va processing ishlarini boshlaydigan professional geo API.
doc:
Geospatial bozorda Python juda kuchli: GIS processing kutubxonalari, AI inference, raster/vector pipeline va automation ko'pincha Python atrofida yuradi. TypeScript frontend xarita va UI uchun qoladi; backendning asosiy API qismi esa Python/FastAPI bo'ladi.

O'rganadigan mavzular

Python typingvenv / pipFastAPIPydanticSQLAlchemyPostGISGeoJSON responsefile upload

Minimal ishga tayyor endpointlar

/health, /layers, /features, /features/{id}, /features/near, /upload va /process. Har endpoint README'da request/response namunasi bilan yoziladi.

Strategiya

Frontend va map UI - React/TS. Backend API, geo processing, AI inference va PostGIS-heavy logic - Python/FastAPI. Shu kombinatsiya xalqaro e'lonlarda kuchli ko'rinadi.

FastAPI + PostGIS service arxitekturasi

api/ main.py core/config.py db/session.py modules/ layers/router.py features/router.py features/service.py uploads/router.py tests/ test_features.py

Router faqat HTTP bilan ishlaydi. Service PostGIS queryni bajaradi. DB session alohida dependency bo'ladi. Shu tartib kodni kattalashganda ham boshqariladigan qiladi.

code.title: main.py

heading.p: Map viewport yoki koordinata bo'yicha obyekt topish.

code.title: features.py
code.code:
from sqlalchemy import text

NEARBY_SQL = text("""
SELECT id, name, ST_AsGeoJSON(geom)::json AS geometry
FROM buildings
WHERE ST_DWithin(
  geom::geography,
  ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(:lng, :lat), 4326)::geography,
  :meters
)
ORDER BY ST_Distance(
  geom::geography,
  ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(:lng, :lat), 4326)::geography
)
LIMIT 50;
""")

async def find_nearby(session, lat: float, lng: float, meters: int = 500):
    rows = await session.execute(NEARBY_SQL, {"lat": lat, "lng": lng, "meters": meters})
    return [dict(row._mapping) for row in rows]

code.title: features_router.py
code.code:
from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, Query
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
from .service import features_in_bbox
from app.db.session import get_session

router = APIRouter(prefix="/features", tags=["features"])

@router.get("/bbox")
async def bbox(
    minx: float = Query(...),
    miny: float = Query(...),
    maxx: float = Query(...),
    maxy: float = Query(...),
    session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session),
):
    return await features_in_bbox(session, (minx, miny, maxx, maxy))

title: GDAL / Shapely / Rasterio
mtitle: GIS processing - fayldan production datagacha
lede: Professional geospatial muhandis faqat xarita chizmaydi; u ma'lumotni tozalaydi, transform qiladi, validatsiya qiladi va servisga tayyorlaydi. Bu modul GDAL, Shapely, GeoPandas, Rasterio va PyProj atrofida quriladi.
doc:
Real data tartibsiz keladi: CRS noto'g'ri, geometry invalid, atributlar aralash, raster katta, formatlar har xil. Bu modulda sen data pipeline qurishni o'rganasan: read -> inspect -> clean -> transform -> validate -> export -> serve.

Asosiy kutubxonalar

GDAL / ogr2ogrGeoPandasShapelyRasterioPyProjCOGGPKGFlatGeobuf

Amaliy pipeline

GeoJSON yoki Shapefile olasan, CRS'ni 4326 ga o'tkazasiz, invalid polygonlarni tuzatasiz, bbox bo'yicha clip qilasiz, PostGIS'ga yozasiz. Raster tomonda GeoTIFF'ni clip, reproject va COG formatga tayyorlashni o'rganasan.

Ishdagi farq

Frontend xaritani chiroyli qiladi. GIS processing esa xarita ortidagi ma'lumotni ishonchli qiladi. Seniorlik shu yerda ko'rinadi.

Data quality checklist

CRSLayer CRS bor, kerak bo'lsa EPSG:4326 ga o'tkazilgan.
GeometryInvalid va empty geometrylar tuzatilgan yoki olib tashlangan.
AttributesKerakli ustunlar nomi toza, null qiymatlar nazorat qilingan.
SizeKatta fayllar clip/simplify qilinib, web uchun yengillashtirilgan.

heading.p: Invalid geometry va CRS muammosini tuzatish.

code.title: clean_vectors.py
code.code:
import geopandas as gpd

src = gpd.read_file("data/raw/regions.geojson")

# Hamma layerni WGS84 ga keltiramiz
if src.crs is None:
    src = src.set_crs(4326)
else:
    src = src.to_crs(4326)

src["geometry"] = src.geometry.make_valid()
src = src[~src.geometry.is_empty]
src[["name", "geometry"]].to_file("data/clean/regions.gpkg", layer="regions", driver="GPKG")

heading.p: GeoTIFF'ni polygon bilan kesish.

code.title: clip_raster.py
code.code:
import geopandas as gpd
import rasterio
from rasterio.mask import mask

area = gpd.read_file("data/clean/aoi.geojson").to_crs(4326)

with rasterio.open("data/raw/ortho.tif") as src:
    shapes = area.to_crs(src.crs).geometry
    clipped, transform = mask(src, shapes, crop=True)
    profile = src.profile
    profile.update(height=clipped.shape[1], width=clipped.shape[2], transform=transform)

with rasterio.open("data/clean/ortho_clip.tif", "w", **profile) as dst:
    dst.write(clipped)

heading.p: Har importdan oldin data sifati bo'yicha qisqa hisobot.

code.title: quality_report.py
code.code:
import geopandas as gpd

layer = gpd.read_file("data/raw/buildings.geojson")
report = {
    "rows": len(layer),
    "crs": str(layer.crs),
    "bounds": layer.total_bounds.tolist(),
    "geometry_types": layer.geometry.geom_type.value_counts().to_dict(),
    "invalid_geometry": int((~layer.geometry.is_valid).sum()),
    "empty_geometry": int(layer.geometry.is_empty.sum()),
}
print(report)

title: Vector Tiles / Tegola / MapLibre
mtitle: Tile pipeline - WebGIS'ning eng muhim qismi
lede: Bu oyda eng qiziq qism: PostGIS -> Tegola -> Vector Tile -> MapLibre zanjirini professional tushunasan. Million obyektni ham silliq ko'rsatadigan tizim quriladi.
doc:
Nega tile kerak? Million binoni bitta GeoJSON sifatida yuborib bo'lmaydi - browser qotadi. Yechim: xaritani kichik kvadratlarga (z/x/y tiles) bo'lib, faqat ko'rinayotgan qismini yuborish.

O'rganadigan mavzular

MVT (Mapbox Vector Tile)z/x/y tile logic Tegola config (.toml)PostGIS provider zoom-based filteringtile cache ST_AsMVT / ST_AsMVTGeomST_Simplify invalid geometry fix

Zoom logikasi (qaysi zoom'da nima ko'rinadi)

z5-7 / davlat chegarasi z8-10 / viloyat, asosiy yo'l, suv z11-13 / shahar yo'llari, tumanlar z14-16 / binolar, ko'chalar z17-18 / uy raqami, detallar

3-oy oxiridagi natija

To'liq PostGIS -> Tegola -> MapLibre pipeline ishlaydi, tile'lar zoom bo'yicha optimizatsiyalangan, cache ishlaydi, va tile sekin ishlaganida sababini topa olasan.

Optimizatsiya kaliti: ST_Simplify

Pastki zoom'larda geometry'ni soddalashtir - uzoqdan binoning aniq shakli kerak emas. Bu tile hajmini keskin kamaytiradi va xaritani tezlashtiradi.

code.title: tegola.toml - asosiy konfiguratsiya
code.code:
[webserver]
port = ":8080"

[[providers]]
name = "postgis"
type = "postgis"
host = "postgres"
port = 5432
database = "gis"
user = "gis"
password = "secret"

[[maps]]
name = "osm"

  [[maps.layers]]
  name = "buildings"
  [maps.layers.provider]
  sql = "SELECT ST_AsBinary(geometry) AS geometry, id, name, height FROM buildings WHERE geometry && !BBOX!"

code.title: Zoom bo'yicha geometry soddalashtirish
code.code:
SELECT
  ST_AsBinary(
    CASE
      WHEN !ZOOM! < 14 THEN ST_Simplify(geometry, 5)
      ELSE geometry
    END
  ) AS geometry,
  id, name, height
FROM buildings
WHERE geometry && !BBOX!

title: Docker / Nginx / Deploy
mtitle: Hammasini bitta production platformaga yig'ish
lede: Frontend, FastAPI API, PostGIS, Tegola, Redis, worker va Nginx - barchasini Docker Compose bilan bitta buyruq orqali ko'tariladigan geospatial platformaga aylantirasan.
doc:
Docker har xizmatni alohida "konteyner"ga joylaydi - sening kompyuteringda ham, serverda ham bir xil ishlaydi. Nginx esa hamma so'rovlarni to'g'ri xizmatga yo'naltiruvchi "qabulxona".

O'rganadigan mavzular

Dockerfiledocker-compose.yml volume / network.env Nginx reverse proxylogsbackupmonitoring

Final loyiha strukturasi

uzbekistan-webgis-platform/ frontend/ # React TS + MapLibre api/ # Python FastAPI API tegola/ # tegola.toml database/ # init.sql, indexes.sql nginx/ # nginx.conf docker-compose.yml .env.example README.md

Docker Compose'dagi servislar

frontendapiworkerpostgres-postgis tegolanginxpgadmin

Yakuniy maqsad

Bitta buyruq - docker compose up -d - butun WebGIS platformani ko'taradi. Bu sening portfoliongdagi eng kuchli isbot.

code.title: docker-compose.yml
code.code:
services:
  postgres:
    image: postgis/postgis:16-3.4
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: gis
      POSTGRES_USER: gis
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: secret
    volumes:
      - pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data
      - ./database/init.sql:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/init.sql

  api:
    build: ./api
    environment:
      DATABASE_URL: postgresql+asyncpg://gis:secret@postgres:5432/gis
    depends_on: [postgres]

  tegola:
    image: gospatial/tegola
    command: serve --config /etc/tegola/config.toml
    volumes:
      - ./tegola/tegola.toml:/etc/tegola/config.toml
    depends_on: [postgres]

  frontend:
    build: ./frontend

  nginx:
    image: nginx:alpine
    ports: ["80:80"]
    volumes:
      - ./nginx/nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf
    depends_on: [api, tegola, frontend]

volumes:
  pgdata:

title: Drone Imagery + YOLO
mtitle: AI-GIS - drone imagery va object detection
lede: Chatdagi e'londa drone imagery va AI object detection muhim edi. Bu modulda sen georeferenced rasm ustida detection natijasini xaritaga olib chiqishni o'rganasan: YOLO inference -> bbox -> GeoJSON -> MapLibre layer.
doc:
AI-GIS yo'nalishida maqsad modelni noldan yaratish emas; avval tayyor model bilan ishlaydigan pipeline qurish. Rasm keladi, model obyekt topadi, natija spatial formatga o'tadi va xaritada tekshiriladi.

O'rganadigan mavzular

orthophotoGeoTIFFYOLO inferencebboxconfidencetilingGeoJSON outputhuman review

Professional ehtiyotkorlik

Detection natijasi 100% haqiqat emas. Productionda confidence threshold, manual review, false positive/false negative hisoboti va data privacy yoziladi.

Portfolio kuchi

Map ustida AI topgan obyektlarni rang bilan ko'rsatish, confidence filtri va review panel qo'shish - oddiy WebGIS loyihani kuchli AI-GIS case studyga aylantiradi.

AI detection oqimi

Drone image / orthophoto -> tile yoki crop -> YOLO inference -> pixel bbox -> georeference transform -> GeoJSON polygon -> FastAPI /detections -> MapLibre layer + confidence filtri -> human review

Bu yerda eng muhim fikr: AI natija xaritada ko'rinishi uchun pixel koordinata spatial koordinataga to'g'ri o'tishi kerak.

heading.p: Rasm bo'yicha detection natijasini JSON qilish.

code.title: detect.py
code.code:
from ultralytics import YOLO

model = YOLO("yolov8n.pt")
results = model("data/tiles/tile_001.jpg", conf=0.35)

features = []
for box in results[0].boxes:
    x1, y1, x2, y2 = box.xyxy[0].tolist()
    features.append({
        "class_id": int(box.cls[0]),
        "confidence": float(box.conf[0]),
        "pixel_bbox": [x1, y1, x2, y2],
    })

print({"detections": features})

title: Cloud / Queue / Scale
mtitle: Cloud va scaling - katta geospatial tizimni yuritish
lede: Kuchli geospatial tizim faqat localhostda emas, productionda yashaydi. Bu modulda AWS/S3, Redis cache, background jobs, queue, Kubernetes asoslari va deployment architecture ishga tayyor darajada tartiblanadi.
doc:
Geospatial workload og'ir bo'ladi: katta raster, tile generation, upload processing, AI inference, search va real-time tracking. Bularni bitta HTTP request ichida bajarish yomon. Og'ir ishlar queue/background workerga ketadi, tez-tez so'raladigan natija cache qilinadi, file storage alohida yuradi.

Arxitektura bloklari

Docker ComposeNginxRedis cacheCelery/RQS3 object storagePostGIS backupKubernetes basicsCI/CD

Qachon Kubernetes?

Boshida Docker Compose yetadi. Kubernetesni faqat ko'p servis, autoscaling, jamoa va cloud talab qilganda chuqurlashtirasan. Lekin deployment, pod, service, ingress, secret tushunchalarini bilish xalqaro suhbatlarda yordam beradi.

Professional signal

README'da architecture diagram, env namuna, backup/restore, healthcheck va monitoring bo'lsa, loyiha toy emasligini ko'rsatadi.

Production deployment chizmasi

Internet -> Nginx (HTTPS, reverse proxy) -> frontend static files -> /api -> FastAPI -> /tiles -> Tegola FastAPI -> PostGIS -> Redis -> Worker queue Worker -> GDAL/Rasterio/YOLO jobs -> object storage

Shu chizma interviewda ham ishlaydi: har komponent nima qiladi, qaysi biri scale qilinadi, qaysi biri state saqlaydi - barchasi tushunarli.

title: Kuzatuv & Monitoring
mtitle: Productionda tizimni kuzatish
lede: Ishlab chiqarishga qo'yilgan WebGIS - jim qolmasligi kerak. Bu modulda healthcheck, log, metrika va xato kuzatuvini sozlaymiz: nosozlikni foydalanuvchidan oldin sen bilasan.
doc:
Observability - tizimning ichida nima bo'layotganini tashqaridan ko'ra olish. Uch ustun bor: loglar (nima bo'ldi), metrikalar (qancha/qachon), traces (so'rov qayerda sekinlashdi).

Healthcheck - eng birinchi qadam

Har servisda /health endpoint bo'lsin: DB ulanishi, disk, navbat holati. Docker va orkestrator shu orqali servis tirikmi-yo'qmi biladi.

Liveness ≠ Readiness

Liveness - servis qotgan emasmi (qayta ishga tushir). Readiness - trafik qabul qilishga tayyormi (DB ulangach). Ikkalasini alohida endpoint qil.

Metrika va dashboard

Prometheus metrikani yig'adi, Grafana ko'rsatadi. Asosiy: so'rov soni, p95 javob vaqti, xato foizi (RED metodi - Rate, Errors, Duration).

Loglar - structured JSON

Matn emas, JSON log yoz: {level, msg, traceId, userId}. Keyin Loki/Elasticsearch'da maydon bo'yicha qidirsa bo'ladi.

Log aggregation - bir joyda qidirish

Ko'p konteyner alohida log yozadi. Ularni bitta joyga yig'ish kerak: Promtail loglarni o'qib Loki'ga yuboradi, Grafana'da {app="api"} |= "error" kabi so'rov bilan qidirasan. Bu ELK (Elasticsearch + Logstash + Kibana) stack'ining yengil muqobili.

Alerting - muammoni oldin bilish

Metrika yig'ilgani kam - alert kerak. Prometheus Alertmanager orqali qoidaga (masalan p95 > 1s yoki 5xx > 5%) yetganda Telegram/Slack/email'ga xabar yuboradi. Yaxshi alert: aniq, kam va harakatga chorlaydigan (actionable) bo'lsin - shovqin (noise) charchatadi.

Alert charchashi (alert fatigue)

Har mayda narsaga alert qo'yma. Faqat foydalanuvchiga ta'sir qiladigan holat (SLO buzilishi) uchun alert qil - qolganini dashboard'da ko'r.

Sentry - xato kuzatuvi

Frontend va backend istisnolarini (exceptions) Sentry yig'adi: stack trace, foydalanuvchi konteksti va necha marta uchraganini bir joyda ko'rasan. Log'dan farqi - u aynan xatolarga ixtisoslashgan va guruhlaydi.

heading.p: So'rov soni va davomiyligini metrika qiladi.

code.title: metrics.py
code.code:
from prometheus_client import Counter, Histogram, make_asgi_app
import time

REQS = Counter('http_requests_total', 'So\'rovlar', ['method', 'path', 'status'])
LAT = Histogram('http_request_seconds', 'Javob vaqti', ['path'])

@app.middleware('http')
async def measure(request, call_next):
    start = time.perf_counter()
    resp = await call_next(request)
    dur = time.perf_counter() - start
    path = request.url.path
    REQS.labels(request.method, path, resp.status_code).inc()
    LAT.labels(path).observe(dur)
    return resp

# /metrics endpointini Prometheus o'qiydi
app.mount('/metrics', make_asgi_app())

heading.p: p95 sekinlashsa yoki 5xx oshsa ogohlantiradi.

code.title: alert.rules.yml
code.code:
groups:
  - name: webgis
    rules:
      - alert: HighLatencyP95
        expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, rate(http_request_seconds_bucket[5m])) > 1
        for: 5m
        labels: { severity: warning }
        annotations:
          summary: "p95 javob vaqti 1s dan oshdi"
      - alert: HighErrorRate
        expr: rate(http_requests_total{status=~"5.."}[5m]) / rate(http_requests_total[5m]) > 0.05
        for: 5m
        labels: { severity: critical }
        annotations:
          summary: "5xx xato foizi 5% dan oshdi"

title: Large Project Build
mtitle: Katta loyiha - bosqichma-bosqich production kod
lede: Senior darajaga yaqinlashish uchun faqat mavzu bilish yetmaydi. Bu modulda GeoPulse platformasini real sprintlar orqali qurish rejasini olasan: issue, branch, migration, API, UI, test, review va release.
doc:
Bu modul kursni "o'qidim" holatdan "qurib chiqdim" holatga o'tkazadi. NEGA bu muhim: bilim faqat ishlaydigan mahsulotga aylanganda portfolio va suhbatda isbot bo'ladi. Bu yerda sen 20+ modulda o'rgangan bo'laklarni bitta production WebGIS platformasiga ulaysan - frontend, FastAPI, PostGIS, tile pipeline, upload/processing va deploy birga ishlaydi.

QANDAY ishlaydi: katta ishni kichik ticketga bo'lish

Katta loyihani bir zarbada yozib bo'lmaydi. Uni sprintlarga, sprintni esa mustaqil bajariladigan kichik ticketlarga bo'lasan. Har ticketning aniq boshi va oxiri (Definition of Done) bo'ladi. Shunda progress ko'rinadi, blok bo'lgan joy tez topiladi va yarim ishlangan feature deploy'ga chiqib ketmaydi.

Sprint xaritasi

Sprint 1: repo, Docker, env, healthcheck Sprint 2: auth, user, role Sprint 3: layers/features CRUD Sprint 4: MapLibre bbox/search UI Sprint 5: upload -> processing queue Sprint 6: tiles/cache/performance Sprint 7: audit log, backup, monitoring Sprint 8: demo, docs, release

Amaliy misol: bitta ticket

"Feature detail panel" ticketini oling. Kirish: GET /features/{id} tayyor. Ish: frontendda marker bosilganda panel ochilib, nom, atribut va koordinatani ko'rsatsin. Chiqish (Done): panel ishlaydi, feature topilmasa toza xato chiqadi, bitta integration test yozilgan, README'da skreenshot bor. Shu ticket bir kunda tugaydi va keyingisiga o'tasan.

Definition of Done

CodeFeature ishlaydi, xato holatlari (404, bo'sh data) qamrab olingan.
TestKamida bitta unit yoki integration test qo'shilgan.
DocsREADME yoki API docs yangilangan.
DemoScreenshot yoki qisqa video bilan isbotlangan.

KENG TARQALGAN XATO

Ko'p feature'ni bir vaqtda yarim-yalti boshlab, hech birini oxirigacha yetkazmaslik. Natijada 10 ta "deyarli tayyor" feature bo'ladi, lekin bitta ham demo qilib bo'lmaydi. Bittasini to'liq Done qilib, keyin keyingisiga o't.

Best practice

Har sprint oxirida ishlaydigan (deploy qilinadigan) versiya bo'lsin. Kichik, tez-tez commit qil; branch -> PR -> merge oqimini saqla. Bitta to'liq tugatilgan platforma o'nlab yarim loyihadan kuchliroq.

title: Performance + Raster/COG
mtitle: PostGIS tuning va real raster/COG pipeline
lede: Bu modul Senior darajadagi eng muhim farqni beradi: katta data sekinlashganda sababini topish. PostGIS query profiling, index strategiya, vector tile optimizatsiya va COG raster pipeline chuqurlashadi.
doc:
NEGA performance muhim

Xarita sekin ochilsa foydalanuvchi ketadi, katta raster butun tizimni bo'g'adi. Lekin eng katta xato - taxmin bilan optimizatsiya qilish. Professional qoida bitta: avval o'lcha, keyin tuzat. O'lchamasdan qilingan "optimizatsiya" ko'pincha vaqt behuda ketkazadi va ba'zan sekinlashtiradi.

QANDAY ishlaydi: sekinlik sababini qatlamma-qatlam qidirish

Sekin xaritani ko'rganda tasodifiy joyni tuzatma. Zanjir bo'ylab yur: browser Network tab (qaysi so'rov sekin?), API latency (server javobi sekinmi?), EXPLAIN ANALYZE (query index'dan foydalanyaptimi yoki butun jadvalni skanlayaptimi?), tile hajmi va cache hit ratio. Har bosqichda p95 (95-foizli) javob vaqtiga qara - o'rtacha emas, chunki sekin holatlar o'rtachada yashirinadi.

Slow map -> browser network tab -> API latency -> EXPLAIN ANALYZE -> index / selectivity -> tile size / cache -> simplify / generalize -> benchmark before/after

Amaliy misol

Bbox so'rovi 1.8s ketyapti. EXPLAIN ANALYZE "Seq Scan" ko'rsatadi - GIST index yo'q. Index qo'yasan, so'rov 40ms ga tushadi. Keyin tile 900KB ekanini ko'rasan; past zoom'da ST_Simplify qo'llab, tile 120KB ga tushadi. Har o'zgarishdan oldin va keyin o'lchab, natijani yozib qo'yasan.

Raster / COG pipeline

GeoTIFF katta bo'ladi (gigabaytlab). Uni to'g'ridan-to'g'ri webga berib bo'lmaydi. Yechim - Cloud Optimized GeoTIFF (COG): ichida overview (past-rezolyutsiya pog'onalari) va tiling bo'ladi, shuning uchun mijoz butun faylni emas, faqat kerakli oynani (HTTP range request bilan) yuklaydi. Rasterio/GDAL bilan clip va reproject qilib, keyin COG formatda saqlaysan.

KENG TARQALGAN XATO

Index qo'shib, keyin tekshirmaslik. ST_Transform yoki funksiya bilan o'ralgan ustunda index ishlamaydi - so'rov baribir Seq Scan bo'lib qoladi. Har doim EXPLAIN ANALYZE bilan "Index Scan" ko'rinishini tasdiqlab qo'y.

Best practice

Optimizatsiyani qiyin son (SLA) bilan bog'la: masalan "bbox so'rov p95 < 200ms". Benchmark natijalarini README yoki PR'ga yoz - shunda seniorlik ko'rinadi.

Step-by-step benchmark: OSM dataset ustida (amaliy)

Quyida haqiqiy ish oqimi - Toshkent OSM yo'llari (~180k LineString) ustida sekin tile'ni bosqichma-bosqich tuzatamiz. Har qadamda o'lchaymiz, keyin tuzatamiz. Raqamlar misol uchun (mashinaga bog'liq), muhimi - metodika va nisbat.

Qadam 0 OSM'ni yuklab, PostGIS'ga import (Geofabrik export) Qadam 1 EXPLAIN ANALYZE - Seq Scan, ~1.4 s Qadam 2 GIST index qo'shish -> ~9 ms Qadam 3 tile hajmi 780 KB (past zoom'da og'ir) Qadam 4 ST_Simplify tolerance bilan -> ~110 KB Qadam 5 before/after jadvali PR'ga yoziladi

Diqqat: ST_Simplify geometriyani soddalashtiradi (nuqtalar sonini kamaytiradi), lekin topologiyani buzishi mumkin (poligonlar teshilib qolishi). Poligonlar uchun ST_SimplifyPreserveTopology yoki ST_SimplifyVW xavfsizroq. Tolerance ni zoom darajasiga bog'la: past zoom - katta tolerance, yuqori zoom - kichik yoki umuman soddalashtirmaslik.

Benchmarkni takrorlanadigan qil

Har o'lchashdan oldin EXPLAIN (ANALYZE, BUFFERS) ishlat va bir necha marta chopib (cache isishi uchun) barqaror raqamni ol. p95 ni yoz, o'rtachani emas - sekin holatlar shu yerda ko'rinadi.

heading.p: Seq Scan -> Index Scan.

code.title: osm_bench.sql
code.code:
-- Qadam 1: INDEXSIZ - Toshkent markazi bbox
EXPLAIN (ANALYZE, BUFFERS)
SELECT osm_id, name
FROM planet_osm_line
WHERE way && ST_Transform(
  ST_MakeEnvelope(69.20, 41.28, 69.32, 41.36, 4326), 3857);
-- Seq Scan on planet_osm_line ... rows=180000 skan
-- Execution Time: ~1400 ms   (misol uchun)

-- Qadam 2: GIST index (osm2pgsql odatda quradi, agar yo'q bo'lsa:)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_osm_line_way
  ON planet_osm_line USING GIST (way);
ANALYZE planet_osm_line;

EXPLAIN (ANALYZE, BUFFERS)
SELECT osm_id, name
FROM planet_osm_line
WHERE way && ST_Transform(
  ST_MakeEnvelope(69.20, 41.28, 69.32, 41.36, 4326), 3857);
-- Index Scan using idx_osm_line_way ...
-- Execution Time: ~9 ms       (misol uchun) -> ~150x tez

heading.h: Qadam 3-4: ST_Simplify bilan tile hajmini kamaytirish

code.title: simplify_bench.sql
code.code:
-- Qadam 3: past zoom'da to'liq geometriya OG'IR (ko'p nuqta).
-- O'lchash uchun GeoJSON hajmini taxminan koraylik:
SELECT
  count(*)                                   AS chiziqlar,
  sum(ST_NPoints(way))                       AS jami_nuqta,
  pg_size_pretty(sum(length(ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(way,4326))))::bigint) AS tahminiy_json
FROM planet_osm_line
WHERE way && ST_Transform(ST_MakeEnvelope(69.1,41.2,69.4,41.4,4326),3857);
-- jami_nuqta: ~1.9M, tahminiy_json: ~780 KB  (misol uchun)

-- Qadam 4: past zoom uchun ST_Simplify (tolerance metrda, SRID 3857)
SELECT
  sum(ST_NPoints(ST_Simplify(way, 40)))      AS nuqta_soddalashgan,
  pg_size_pretty(sum(length(
     ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(ST_Simplify(way, 40),4326))
  ))::bigint)                                AS json_soddalashgan
FROM planet_osm_line
WHERE way && ST_Transform(ST_MakeEnvelope(69.1,41.2,69.4,41.4,4326),3857);
-- nuqta: ~1.9M -> ~260k, json: ~780 KB -> ~110 KB  (misol uchun) = ~7x kichik

-- OGOHLANTIRISH: poligonlar uchun topologiyani saqlaydigan variant:
--   ST_SimplifyPreserveTopology(geom, tolerance)
--   yoki ST_SimplifyVW(geom, area_tolerance)

title: Security + Backup
mtitle: Auth, role, audit log va backup/restore amaliyoti
lede: Production tizimda xavfsizlik alohida modul emas, har feature ichida bo'lishi kerak. Bu modulda JWT, role, permission, audit log, rate limit, secret management va PostGIS backup/restore amaliyoti qo'shiladi.
doc:
NEGA security va backup birga

Platforma qanchalik chiroyli bo'lmasin, himoyasiz yoki tiklab bo'lmaydigan bo'lsa - production emas. Security ma'lumotni ruxsatsiz kirishdan saqlaydi; backup esa nosozlik, xato o'chirish yoki hujumdan keyin ishni tiklaydi. Ikkalasi bitta modulda, chunki ikkalasi ham "eng yomon holatga tayyorlik".

QANDAY ishlaydi: himoya qatlamlari

Xavfsizlik bitta tekshiruv emas, qatlamlar zanjiri. So'rov ketma-ket o'tadi: HTTPS/Nginx (shifrlash va rate limit), JWT verify (kim ekaning), role/permission check (nima qilishga haqli), input validation (data toza), audit log (iz qoldirish). Bittasi tushib qolsa, keyingisi ushlaydi - shuning uchun "defense in depth" deyiladi.

Request -> HTTPS / Nginx -> rate limit -> JWT verify -> role / permission check -> input validation -> audit log -> business action

Amaliy misol

Admin CRUD, /upload va /process endpointlari eng xavfli - ular data o'zgartiradi. Bu yerga alohida e'tibor: faqat admin role, fayl kengaytmasi va hajmi tekshiruvi, va har o'zgarish audit log jadvaliga (kim, qachon, nima) yoziladi. Shu log keyin "kim bu qatlamni o'chirdi?" degan savolga javob beradi.

Recovery fikrlash

Backup borligi yetmaydi. Hech qachon tiklanmagan backup - aslida backup emas, taxmin. Shuning uchun har oy restore drill qilinadi: backup'dan bo'sh bazaga tiklab, data butunligini tekshirasan. RPO (qancha data yo'qolishi mumkin) va RTO (qancha vaqtda tiklanadi) raqamlarini oldindan belgila.

KENG TARQALGAN XATO

Maxfiy qiymatlarni (DB parol, JWT secret) kodga yoki gitga yozib qo'yish. Ular .env'da bo'lishi va .gitignore'ga tushishi shart; repoda faqat .env.example qoladi. Bir marta gitga tushgan secret - ochilgan secret, uni almashtirish kerak.

Best practice

Least privilege: har role faqat kerakli ruxsatga ega bo'lsin. Backup avtomatik (cron) va serverdan tashqarida (off-site) saqlansin. Restore vaqtini o'lchab, README'da yozib qo'y.

title: Testing + CI/CD + Observability
mtitle: Testlar, real CI/CD va Prometheus/Grafana config
lede: Senior darajada 'menda ishlaydi' yetmaydi. Kod har pushda testdan o'tishi, deploy qilinishi va productionda kuzatilishi kerak. Bu modul unit, integration, E2E, CI/CD va observabilityni real configlar bilan beradi.
doc:
NEGA test va CI/CD

Qo'lda tekshirish scale bo'lmaydi: loyiha o'sgan sari har o'zgarishni qo'lda sinash imkonsiz bo'ladi va regressiya (avval ishlagan narsaning buzilishi) sezilmay o'tadi. Avtomatik test va CI/CD har commit'ni bir xil tekshiradi, buzilishni deploy'dan oldin ushlaydi va relizni ishonchli qiladi.

QANDAY ishlaydi: test piramidasi

Testlar teng emas. Pastda ko'p, tez va arzon unit testlar; o'rtada kamroq integration test; tepada juda kam, sekin E2E test. Bu shakl "piramida" deyiladi. Sabab: unit test xatoni aniq joyda tez ko'rsatadi, E2E esa butun oqimni tekshiradi lekin sekin va mo'rt. Ko'pchilikni pastga qo'ysang, test to'plami tez va barqaror bo'ladi.

Unit tests: service, validation, pure logic Integration tests: FastAPI + test DB + PostGIS E2E tests: browser flow (map / search / upload) Smoke tests: deploydan keyin /health, /ready, /metrics

Amaliy misol: CI/CD oqimi

GitHub'ga push qilasan -> CI ishga tushadi: lint, type check, unit + integration test, Docker build. Hammasi yashil bo'lsa -> deploy bosqichi ishga tushadi -> serverga chiqadi -> smoke test /health va /metrics'ni tekshiradi. Bironta bosqich qizil bo'lsa, oqim to'xtaydi va buzuq kod productionga chiqmaydi.

Observability - deploy'dan keyin ko'rish

Test deploy oldini himoya qiladi; observability deploy'dan keyin nima bo'layotganini ko'rsatadi. Uch ustun: loglar (nima bo'ldi), metrikalar (qancha va qachon), trace (qayerda sekinlashdi). Minimal stack: structured JSON logs, Prometheus metrics, Grafana dashboard va bitta alert qoidasi (masalan p95 latency oshsa xabar).

KENG TARQALGAN XATO

Faqat "happy path"ni test qilish. Real xatolar chekka holatlarda chiqadi: bo'sh bbox, noto'g'ri CRS, buzuq upload fayli, 404. Aynan shu holatlarni test bilan qamrab olsang, productionda kutilmagan crash kamayadi.

Best practice

Testni CI'da majburiy qil (qizil test merge'ni bloklaydi). Flaky (goh o'tadigan, goh yiqiladigan) testni darhol tuzat yoki o'chir - ishonchsiz test hech qanday testdan yomonroq.

title: AI Evaluation + System Design
mtitle: AI detection evaluation va geospatial system design case studylar
lede: AI-GIS moduli modelni ishlatishni beradi; bu modul esa natijani professional baholashni o'rgatadi: dataset split, precision/recall, confusion matrix, review workflow va katta geospatial tizimlarni loyihalash.
doc:
NEGA AI evaluation va system design

AI-GIS loyihada model "ishlayapti"ni his bilan aytib bo'lmaydi - uni raqam bilan o'lchash kerak. Xuddi shunday, senior darajada sendan alohida feature emas, butun tizimni loyihalash so'raladi. Bu modul ikkala ko'nikmani beradi: model sifatini baholash va katta tizim arxitekturasini chizish.

QANDAY ishlaydi: model baholash oqimi

Datani uch qismga bo'lasan: train (o'rgatish), val (sozlash), test (yakuniy baho - modelni hech qachon ko'rmagan data). Annotatsiya sifatini tekshirasan, keyin inference qilib metrikalarni hisoblaysan: precision (topilganlarning qanchasi haqiqiy), recall (haqiqiylarning qanchasi topildi), F1 (ikkisining muvozanati). Confidence threshold'ni shu metrikalarga qarab sozlaysan.

Dataset -> train / val / test split -> annotation quality check -> model inference -> precision / recall / F1 -> false positive review -> threshold tuning -> human-in-the-loop workflow

Amaliy misol: threshold trade-off

Dron rasmida bino topuvchi model. Threshold'ni past qo'ysang - recall oshadi (kam bino qoldiriladi), lekin precision tushadi (ko'p noto'g'ri detection). Baland qo'ysang - aksincha. Qaysi biri muhimroq loyihaga bog'liq: soliq inventarizatsiyasida recall, avtomatik qaror chiqarishda precision ustun. Shu qarorni raqam bilan asoslash - aynan senior fikrlash.

System design case studylar

Real-time trackingGPS ingest, WebSocket, Redis, PostGIS, xarita jonli yangilanishi.
National map portalTile pipeline, CDN, cache, permissions, admin workflow.
Drone inspectionUpload, queue, AI inference, human review, report export.

KENG TARQALGAN XATO

Test data'ni model sozlashda ishlatib yuborish (data leakage). Bunda metrikalar chiroyli chiqadi, lekin real dunyoda model yiqiladi. Test to'plamiga faqat bir marta, yakunda tegin.

Best practice

Har doim human-in-the-loop qoldir: AI taklif qiladi, odam tasdiqlaydi. System design suhbatida avval talab va cheklovlarni so'ra, keyin komponent chiz va har birining trade-off'ini ochib ayt.

title: Pro / Senior darajaga
mtitle: Developer'dan senior darajaga
lede: Sen bu sohada allaqachon developersan - bu bo'lim kursni tugatish haqida emas, darajangni ko'tarish haqida. Junior'ni senior'dan ajratadigan narsa ko'proq kontent emas: chuqurlik, real yuk va ko'rinish.
doc:
Eng muhim maslahat boshidayoq: kenglikka emas, chuqurlikka ket. 1 ta real, deploy qilingan, optimallashtirilgan loyiha - 10 ta yarim loyihadan kuchli isbot.

1 / Bitta real, jonli loyiha (toy emas)

Localhost'da emas - haqiqiy VPS'da (Hetzner / DigitalOcean), o'z domeningda, HTTPS bilan, real O'zbekiston OSM datasi bilan. Odamlar ochib ko'ra olsin. Bu darajangni tezroq hech narsa ko'tara olmaydi.

2 / Performance va masshtab

"Ishlaydi" oson, "million obyektda tez ishlaydi" - qiyin. Aynan shu chiziq junior'ni senior'dan ajratadi.

EXPLAIN ANALYZE BUFFERSGIST / SP-GIST / BRIN partitioningtile cache + seeding pmtiles / mbtilesclusteringCDN

3 / Data engineering - sohaning yashirin yarmi

Ko'p WebGIS dev shu yerda to'xtaydi - shuning uchun bu yerda kuchli bo'lsang ajralib turasan.

GDAL / ogr2ogrosm2pgsql / imposm3 OSM diff updatesGPKG / FlatGeobuf / COG

4 / Stack'ni strategik kengaytir

Job e'lonlariga qarab muqobillarni bil - bittasini chuqur, qolganini "nima uchun kerakligini" darajada.

lede: Bu yakuniy track WebGIS kursini haqiqiy ish simulyatsiyasiga aylantiradi: FastAPI, PostGIS, MapLibre, COG/raster, YOLO, Docker, CI/CD, monitoring va security bitta tekshiriladigan portfolio natijasida yig'iladi.
doc:
Bu modul nima uchun kerak

Senior daraja faqat texnologiya nomlarini bilish emas. Senior natija beradi: katta data bilan ishlaydi, sekin joyni o'lchaydi, xatoni test bilan ushlaydi, deploymentni hujjatlaydi va tizimni kuzata oladi. Shu modulda GeoPulse Production Lab 6 ta sprintga bo'linadi.

Sprint 1 / repo skeletonSprint 2 / PostGIS benchmarkSprint 3 / COG rasterSprint 4 / FastAPI testsSprint 5 / CI/CD + DockerSprint 6 / monitoring + security report

6 sprintlik ish rejasi

Sprint 1 Monorepo: frontend, api, processing, database, infra Sprint 2 PostGIS: import, GIST index, EXPLAIN ANALYZE, before/after report Sprint 3 Raster/COG: GeoTIFF -> COG, overview, tile/read benchmark Sprint 4 FastAPI: auth, bbox endpoint, upload endpoint, pytest integration Sprint 5 Docker/CI: compose, healthcheck, lint, test, build pipeline Sprint 6 Observability/security: Prometheus metric, Grafana panel, audit log, backup/restore drill

Professional definition of done

Har sprint oxirida faqat kod emas, dalil topshiriladi: benchmark jadvali, test natijasi, screenshot, log namunasi, architecture decision record yoki security report. Shu dalil bo'lmasa, ish tugagan hisoblanmaydi.

Portfolio uchun oltin qoida

README ichida "nima qildim" emas, "qanday tekshirdim" ko'rinsin. Ish beruvchi kodni ko'radi, lekin qaror va tekshiruv seni mutaxassis sifatida ko'rsatadi.

EXPLAIN (ANALYZE, BUFFERS)
SELECT id, name, category
FROM assets
WHERE geom && ST_MakeEnvelope(69.1, 41.2, 69.4, 41.4, 4326)
LIMIT 500;

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS assets_geom_gix ON assets USING GIST (geom);

title: Backend/FastAPI Production Lab
mtitle: FastAPI backend: JS/TS developer uchun production geospatial API
lede: Bu modul Geospatial Full-Stack Academy'ning backend qismini chuqurlashtiradi: Python/FastAPI, SQLAlchemy/Alembic, PostGIS bbox query, auth/RBAC, pytest, Redis worker va job status endpointlari.
doc:
Nega bu modul kerak

Siz frontend va JS/TS tarafdan kuchlisiz, lekin geospatial backendda Python ekotizimi juda katta rol o'ynaydi. FastAPI API, Pydantic schema, SQLAlchemy session, Alembic migration, PostGIS query va Redis worker birga ishlaganda haqiqiy production backend hosil bo'ladi.

JS/TS dan Python/FastAPI ga o'tish xaritasi

TypeScript type -> Python typingZod -> PydanticExpress middleware -> FastAPI dependencyPrisma migration -> AlembicJest/Vitest -> pytestBullMQ -> Redis/RQ/Celery

Eng muhim farq: Python'da runtime ekotizim geodata bilan kuchli. GDAL, Rasterio, GeoPandas, Shapely, Ultralytics kabi kutubxonalar backend va processing workerlar bilan tabiiy ulanadi.

Production API flow

React + MapLibre -> GET /api/features?bbox=minx,miny,maxx,maxy -> FastAPI dependency: auth + role + validation -> SQLAlchemy session -> PostGIS ST_MakeEnvelope / ST_Intersects -> GeoJSON FeatureCollection Upload flow -> POST /api/uploads -> file validation -> Redis job enqueue -> worker: GDAL/Rasterio/YOLO -> GET /api/jobs/{id}

Professional definition of done

Backend "ishladi" degani yetmaydi. Har endpoint uchun contract, error response, auth behavior, test va log bo'lishi kerak. Har migration qayta ishlaydigan bo'lishi, har job retry/failure holatini ko'rsatishi kerak.

Backend senior signali

Endpoint yozish oson; production API esa: validation, migration, test DB, idempotency, retry, observability va security bilan tugaydi.

code.title: app/features/router.py
code.code:
from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, Query
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
from app.db import get_session
from app.auth.dependencies import require_user
from app.features.schemas import BBox
from app.features.service import get_features_in_bbox

router = APIRouter(prefix="/api/features", tags=["features"])

@router.get("")
async def list_features(
    bbox: str = Query(..., description="minx,miny,maxx,maxy"),
    session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session),
    user = Depends(require_user),
):
    parts = [float(x) for x in bbox.split(",")]
    box = BBox(minx=parts[0], miny=parts[1], maxx=parts[2], maxy=parts[3])
    features = await get_features_in_bbox(session, box, user=user)
    return {"type": "FeatureCollection", "features": features}

heading.p: SQLAlchemy bilan PostGIS funksiyalarini aniq va testlanadigan qilib yoz.

code.title: app/features/repository.py
code.code:
from sqlalchemy import text

async def fetch_features_in_bbox(session, bbox, limit: int = 500):
    sql = text("""
        SELECT jsonb_build_object(
          'type', 'Feature',
          'id', id,
          'geometry', ST_AsGeoJSON(geom)::jsonb,
          'properties', jsonb_build_object('name', name, 'category', category)
        ) AS feature
        FROM assets
        WHERE geom && ST_MakeEnvelope(:minx, :miny, :maxx, :maxy, 4326)
        ORDER BY id
        LIMIT :limit
    """)
    rows = await session.execute(sql, {**bbox.model_dump(), "limit": limit})
    return [row.feature for row in rows]

heading.p: Schema va spatial index kod bilan versiyalanadi.

code.title: migrations/versions/001_assets.py
code.code:
from alembic import op
import sqlalchemy as sa
from geoalchemy2 import Geometry

def upgrade():
    op.create_table(
        "assets",
        sa.Column("id", sa.BigInteger(), primary_key=True),
        sa.Column("name", sa.Text(), nullable=False),
        sa.Column("category", sa.Text(), nullable=False),
        sa.Column("geom", Geometry("GEOMETRY", srid=4326), nullable=False),
    )
    op.create_index("assets_geom_gix", "assets", ["geom"], postgresql_using="gist")

def downgrade():
    op.drop_index("assets_geom_gix", table_name="assets")
    op.drop_table("assets")

title: MapLibre Frontend Production Lab
mtitle: MapLibre frontend: operator uchun production xarita interfeysi
lede: Bu modul Geospatial Full-Stack Academy frontend qismini kuchaytiradi: React + TypeScript + MapLibre bilan layer toggle, filter/search, selected feature, bbox data loading, performance va frontend testlar.
doc:
Nega frontend xarita alohida lab bo'lishi kerak

Geospatial ilovada xarita shunchaki rasm emas. U operatorning asosiy ish joyi: qatlamlarni yoqadi/o'chiradi, obyekt qidiradi, filtrlaydi, detallarni ko'radi, xatoni sezadi va sekinlikni darhol his qiladi. Shu sabab React + MapLibre qismi ham backend kabi contract, state, performance va test bilan qurilishi kerak.

Production map UX flow

Map load -> style ready -> layer registry -> viewport bbox query -> loading / empty / error states -> feature click -> details panel -> filter/search changes -> debounced refetch -> URL state / shareable view

Map state modeli

Professional xaritada state tarqoq bo'lmasligi kerak. Layer visibility, selected feature, active filters, viewport bbox, loading/error va query cache alohida model bo'ladi. TypeScript tiplari frontend/backend contractni buzilishdan himoya qiladi.

Layer registryFeature typesAPI clientuseViewportQuerydebounced moveendselected feature panelaccessibility

Performance yondashuvi

MapLibre sekinlashsa sabab ko'p bo'lishi mumkin: ortiqcha GeoJSON, har move'da refetch, keraksiz rerender, katta marker soni, tile style og'irligi yoki browser memory. Har safar o'lchov bilan ishlaysan: FPS, network count, payload size, render duration va layer count.

Operator UX qoidasi

Xarita sekin yoki noaniq bo'lsa, operator noto'g'ri qaror qiladi. Shuning uchun loading, error, empty, selected va offline-ish holatlar dizaynning markazida turadi.

title: Processing/COG Production Lab
mtitle: Geospatial processing: GDAL, Rasterio, Shapely va COG pipeline
lede: Bu modul data processing qismini yakunlaydi: GeoJSON/GPKG validation, geometry fix, raster clip/reproject, COG yaratish, metadata report va worker ichida takrorlanadigan pipeline.
doc:
Processing nima uchun qimmat skill

Geospatial loyihalarda data ko'pincha tayyor holatda kelmaydi: CRS noto'g'ri, geometry invalid, raster juda katta, attribute nomlari chalkash, fayl formatlari turlicha. Professional muhandis data'ni productionga tayyorlaydi: validate -> transform -> optimize -> publish -> verify.

Pipeline bosqichlari

Input -> inspect metadata (CRS, bounds, size, geometry type) -> validate geometry / raster profile -> reproject to target CRS -> clean attributes -> optimize (COG, simplify, index) -> publish to storage/PostGIS -> generate processing report

Har processing job oxirida faqat output fayl emas, report ham chiqadi: input size, output size, CRS, bounds, duration, warninglar va validation natijasi.

Senior qoida

Processing pipeline idempotent bo'lsin: bir xil input bir xil output beradi, xato bo'lsa qayerda to'xtaganini logdan bilasan.

heading.p: Processingdan oldin fayl haqida faktlarni yozib ol.

code.title: processing/inspect_raster.py
code.code:
import rasterio

def inspect_raster(path: str) -> dict:
    with rasterio.open(path) as src:
        return {
            "crs": str(src.crs),
            "bounds": tuple(src.bounds),
            "width": src.width,
            "height": src.height,
            "count": src.count,
            "dtype": src.dtypes[0],
        }

heading.p: Invalid geometry production query va tile pipeline'ni buzadi.

code.title: processing/fix_geometries.py
code.code:
import geopandas as gpd

def clean_vector(input_path: str, output_path: str):
    gdf = gpd.read_file(input_path)
    gdf = gdf.to_crs("EPSG:4326")
    gdf["geometry"] = gdf.geometry.make_valid()
    gdf = gdf[~gdf.geometry.is_empty]
    gdf.to_file(output_path, driver="GPKG")

heading.p: Webga tayyor raster uchun overview va tiling kerak.

code.title: processing/make_cog.sh
code.code:
gdalwarp -t_srs EPSG:3857 input.tif warped.tif
gdaladdo -r average warped.tif 2 4 8 16
gdal_translate warped.tif output_cog.tif -of COG -co COMPRESS=DEFLATE -co BIGTIFF=IF_SAFER
gdalinfo output_cog.tif

code.title: processing/report.py
code.code:
from dataclasses import asdict, dataclass
from time import perf_counter

@dataclass
class ProcessingReport:
    input_path: str
    output_path: str
    duration_ms: int
    warnings: list[str]
    output_size_mb: float

def run_with_report(input_path: str, output_path: str, fn):
    start = perf_counter()
    warnings = fn(input_path, output_path)
    duration_ms = int((perf_counter() - start) * 1000)
    return asdict(ProcessingReport(input_path, output_path, duration_ms, warnings or [], 0.0))

title: YOLO Detection Lifecycle Lab
mtitle: YOLO detection: dataset, inference, evaluation va geospatial output
lede: Bu modul YOLO qismini tugatadi: dataset tayyorlash, inference, confidence threshold, precision/recall/F1, false positive tahlil va detection natijalarini xaritada ko'rsatish.
doc:
AI-GIS'da model nomi yetarli emas

YOLO ishlatish - faqat modelni chaqirish emas. Professional workflow: datasetni hujjatlash, label sifatini tekshirish, inference natijasini georeference qilish, threshold tanlash, false positive/false negative tahlil qilish va operatorga tushunarli confidence bilan ko'rsatish.

Dataset -> labels QA -> train/val split -> inference -> evaluation metrics -> threshold decision -> geospatial post-processing -> MapLibre detection layer -> model card

Real ish signali

Model yaxshi deyish emas, qayerda adashishini ko'rsatish seniorlik belgisi. False positive va false negative misollarini reportga qo'sh.

heading.p: Modelni metrika bilan tekshir.

title: Cloud Native: AWS + Kubernetes
mtitle: Geospatial platformani AWS va Kubernetes'da ishga tushirish
lede: Docker Compose bitta serverда yaxshi, lekin global ish AWS + Kubernetes talab qiladi: EC2/ECS/EKS, S3 tile/imagery, RDS PostGIS, autoscaling va zero-downtime deploy. Bu modul lokal Compose'дан bulut-native arxitekturaga o'tkazadi.
doc:
Nega bu modul kerak

Real geospatial ish e'lonlarida deyarli har doim AWS/Kubernetes talab bor. Docker'ni bilishing yetarli emas - uni bulutда orkestратsiya qilish, imagery'ni S3'да saqlash va PostGIS'ni RDS'да boshqarishni bilishing kerak.

Asosiy tushunchalar

  • S3 - tile, COG raster, dron rasm va model artefaktlari uchun obyekt xotira.
  • RDS + PostGIS - boshqariladigan PostgreSQL, backup va replica bilan.
  • ECS/EKS - konteynerlarni ishga tushirish. EKS = Kubernetes, ECS = AWS-native.
  • Kubernetes obyektlari - Deployment (pod nusxalari), Service (tarmoq), Ingress (tashqi kirish), HPA (autoscale).
S3RDS PostGISEKSIngressHPA autoscale

Muhim: secretlar (DB parol, API kalit) hech qachon image ichiga yozilmaydi - Kubernetes Secret yoki AWS Secrets Manager ishlatiladi.

heading.p: FastAPI geo-API'ni EKS'da 3 nusxada, health check va resurs limiti bilan.

code.title: k8s/api-deployment.yaml
code.code:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: geo-api
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels: { app: geo-api }
  template:
    metadata:
      labels: { app: geo-api }
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: api
          image: 123456789.dkr.ecr.eu-central-1.amazonaws.com/geo-api:1.4.0
          ports: [{ containerPort: 8000 }]
          envFrom:
            - secretRef: { name: geo-api-secrets }
          resources:
            requests: { cpu: "250m", memory: "256Mi" }
            limits:   { cpu: "1",    memory: "512Mi" }
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet: { path: /health, port: 8000 }
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata: { name: geo-api }
spec:
  selector: { app: geo-api }
  ports: [{ port: 80, targetPort: 8000 }]

heading.p: Yuk oshganda podlar avtomatik ko'payadi - imagery processing peak'lari uchun.

code.title: k8s/api-hpa.yaml
code.code:
apiVersion: autoscaling/v2
kind: HorizontalPodAutoscaler
metadata: { name: geo-api }
spec:
  scaleTargetRef:
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    name: geo-api
  minReplicas: 3
  maxReplicas: 20
  metrics:
    - type: Resource
      resource:
        name: cpu
        target: { type: Utilization, averageUtilization: 70 }

title: Async, Queue & Real-time Scale
mtitle: Og'ir ishni queue'ga berish va jonli yangilanish
lede: Dron rasm processing yoki YOLO inference HTTP so'rov ichida bajarilmaydi - u sekund/daqiqalar oladi. Celery + Redis/RabbitMQ bilan og'ir ishni background'ga berasan, WebSocket bilan natijani xaritaga jonli uzatasan.
doc:
Muammo

Foydalanuvchi 2 GB dron rasmini yuklaydi va YOLO detection so'raydi. Agar buni HTTP handler ichida qilsang - so'rov timeout bo'ladi, server bloklanadi. Yechim: ishni queue'ga ber, darrov job ID qaytar, natijani keyin uzat.

Arxitektura

  • Broker (Redis/RabbitMQ) - vazifalar navbati.
  • Celery worker - navbatdan olib, og'ir ishni bajaradi (alohida process/pod).
  • Result backend - job holati va natija (Redis).
  • WebSocket/SSE - tugagach natijani xaritaga jonli push.
produce taskqueueworkerresultpush

Idempotency: bir task ikki marta ishlansa ham natija buzilmasligi kerak (retry xavfsiz bo'lsin).

heading.p: API og'ir detection ishini queue'ga beradi va job ID qaytaradi.

title: MLOps: CV modellarni production'da
mtitle: YOLO modelni deploy, monitor va scale qilish
lede: Modelni o'qitish - ishning 20%. Qolgan 80% - uni production'da serve qilish: versiyalash, GPU/ONNX inference, batch pipeline, drift monitoring va retrain. Ish e'lonlari aynan shu 'production ML' qismini talab qiladi.
doc:
Train qilish yetarli emas

Ish e'loni aytadi: "deploy, monitor, and scale object detection models in production". Ya'ni modelni ishlab chiqarishда barqaror serve qilish, natijani kuzatish va sifat pasaysa qayta o'qitish kerak.

MLOps hayot sikli

  • Serving - modelни API sifatida (TorchServe, yoki ONNX Runtime + FastAPI). GPU'да tez inference.
  • Versioning - har model versiyasi kuzatiladi (model registry), rollback mumkin.
  • Batch vs online - katta imagery uchun batch, jonli so'rov uchun online.
  • Monitoring - latency, confidence taqsimoti, data drift (kirish rasm taqsimoti o'zgarsa).
  • Retrain loop - yangi belgilangan data bilan qayta o'qitish va A/B taqqoslash.
serveversionmonitordriftretrain

heading.h: ONNX Runtime bilan tez inference servis
heading.p: PyTorch YOLO ONNX'ga eksport qilinib, engil va tez serve qilinadi.

code.title: app/serving.py
code.code:
import onnxruntime as ort
import numpy as np

# YOLO -> ONNX: model.export(format='onnx')
session = ort.InferenceSession(
    "models/yolo_v3.onnx",
    providers=["CUDAExecutionProvider", "CPUExecutionProvider"],
)

def infer(image: np.ndarray) -> list[dict]:
    x = preprocess(image)                       # resize, normalize, NCHW
    outputs = session.run(None, {"images": x})
    boxes = postprocess(outputs, conf=0.35)     # NMS, threshold
    return [{"bbox": b.xyxy, "score": float(b.score), "cls": b.cls} for b in boxes]

heading.p: Har inference metrikasi yoziladi; o'rtacha confidence pasaysa - drift ogohlantirishi.

title: 3D Reconstruction & katta imagery
mtitle: Dron rasmlaridan 3D relyef va katta miqyosli pipeline
lede: Bu eng nodir va farqlovchi ko'nikma: dron rasmlaridan photogrammetry orqali point cloud va 3D mesh yaratish, hamda yuz minglab kv metr ultra-HD imagery'ni tiling va COG bilan masshtabli qayta ishlash.
doc:
Nega bu - farqlovchi ko'nikma

Geo + full-stack biladiganlar bor, lekin 3D reconstruction (point cloud, mesh, terrain) biladiganlar juda kam. Aynan shu Safe Pro kabi kompaniyalarning yadrosi.

Photogrammetry pipeline

  • SfM (Structure from Motion) - ko'p rasmdan kamera pozitsiyasi va siyrak point cloud (COLMAP, OpenDroneMap).
  • Dense cloud + Mesh - zich point cloud, keyin 3D yuzalar (mesh).
  • DSM/DTM + Orthophoto - balandlik modeli va to'g'rilangan yagona rasm.
  • Point cloud ishlash - PDAL, Open3D bilan filtr, classification, tiling.

Katta imagery miqyosi

  • Tiling - yuz minglab kv metrni bo'laklarga bo'lib ishlash.
  • COG + STAC - bulut-optimized raster va katalog (qidiriladigan metadata).
  • Parallel/distributed - Dask yoki queue bilan taqsimlangan raster processing.
SfMpoint cloudmeshDSMCOG/STAC

title: Edge, Offline & GeoDjango
mtitle: Dala uchun offline/edge va Django geo-stack
lede: Dala operatorlari ko'pincha internetsiz ishlaydi - model va xarita edge'да, offline ishlashi kerak. Yana ko'p geo kompaniya FastAPI o'rniga Django/GeoDjango ishlatadi - shuni ham bilib qo'yasan.
doc:
Edge & Offline

Ish e'loni aytadi: "perform well offline and on the edge". Demining operatori sahroda, internetsiz - model qurilmaда, xarita keshда ishlashi shart.

  • Model quantization - ONNX/TFLite bilan kichik, tez model (edge qurilma uchun).
  • Offline-first PWA - service worker bilan xarita tile va data keshlanadi (loyihada pwa.ts asosi bor).
  • Sync - internet qaytгач lokal o'zgarishlar serverga sinxronlanadi.

GeoDjango (ixtiyoriy, lekin ish e'lonlarida bor)

JD ko'pincha Python (Django/FastAPI) deydi. Django + GeoDjango spatial ORM beradi: PointField, spatial query'lar ORM darajasida.

quantizationoffline PWAsyncGeoDjango

heading.p: Spatial ORM: geometry ustuni va radius bo'yicha qidiruv - SQL yozmasdan.

from django.contrib.gis.db import models
from django.contrib.gis.geos import Point
from django.contrib.gis.measure import D

class Detection(models.Model):
    label = models.CharField(max_length=64)
    score = models.FloatField()
    location = models.PointField(geography=True)   # PostGIS geometry
    created = models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)

title: Senior Final Assessment
mtitle: Geospatial Full-Stack Academy yakuniy imtihoni
lede: Bu modul kursni yopadi: final demo, code review, system design, performance defense, security review va portfolio presentation bilan senior-ready daraja baholanadi.
doc:
Final assessment nima

Bu oddiy quiz emas. Bu ishga kirish yoki mijoz oldida himoya qilishga yaqin sinov. Siz bitta geospatial platformani tushuntirasiz, kodini ko'rsatasiz, performance raqamlarini himoya qilasiz, security savollariga javob berasiz va keyingi roadmapni aytasiz.

Baholash bloklari

Live demoCode reviewSystem designPerformance defenseSecurity reviewOps runbookPortfolio pitch

Daraja mezoni

Junior-ready: feature qo'sha oladi. Middle-ready: frontend/backend/data pipeline'ni mustaqil bog'laydi. Senior-ready: trade-off qiladi, performance va securityni isbotlaydi, production incidentga tayyor.

Bitirish sharti

Demo ishlashi yetmaydi. Dalil kerak: test output, benchmark, architecture diagram, runbook, model card, security report va README.

heading.p: Bitirishdan oldin barcha dalillar bir joyga yig'iladi.

title: Karyera / Ish topish
mtitle: Mahoratdan ish o'rniga - to'liq qo'llanma
lede: Texnik bilim - yarmi. Ikkinchi yarmi: seni topishlari, mahoratingni isbotlashing va suhbatda sotishing. Bu bo'lim ish izlashning har bosqichini - strategiyadan maosh kelishuviga qadar - professional darajada ochadi.
doc:
Tartibni yodda tut: strategiya -> isbot (GitHub/portfolio) -> taqdimot (CV/LinkedIn) -> ariza -> suhbat -> kelishuv. Hammasi bitta jonli loyiha atrofida quriladi - shu loyiha sening butun karyera hikoyangning markazi.

1 / Ish izlash strategiyasi

Ish izlash - bu ham loyiha. 100 ta arzon ariza emas, sifatli ozchilik ishlaydi. Avval segmentingni tanla:

Mahalliy kompaniyalarMasofaviy (remote) Xalqaro / freelanceDavlat / GIS tashkilotlari

Masofaviy va xalqaro ish ko'proq to'laydi, lekin English va yozma muloqot talab qiladi. Mahalliy ish portfolio va aloqa orqali tezroq keladi. Ko'pchilik uchun to'g'ri yo'l: mahalliy/remote'dan boshlab, portfolio kuchayganda xalqaroga o'tish.

Voronka mantig'i

Har 100 ariza -> ~10 javob -> ~4 suhbat -> ~1 taklif. Shuning uchun rad javob normal. Muhimi - har bosqichdagi konversiyani oshirish: kuchli CV javobni, kuchli portfolio suhbatni, kuchli pitch taklifni oshiradi.

2 / GitHub - recruiter birinchi ko'radigan joy

Profil README: o'z username'ing bilan bir xil nomli repo (masalan aliyev/aliyev) ochsang, ichidagi README profil sahifangda chiqadi. Bu sening "bosh sahifang".

Pinned loyihalar: eng yaxshi 3-6 ta. Birinchi o'rinda - flagship WebGIS loyihang. Har repo'da tushunarli README bo'lsin (demo havolasi, arxitektura, ishga tushirish, screenshot).

Repo gigienasi: .gitignore (node_modules, .env tushmaydi), LICENSE, va semantik versiya teglari (v1.0.0) - bular seni tartibli muhandis qilib ko'rsatadi.

Contribution grafigi haqida haqiqat: yashil kvadratlar yoqimli, lekin asosiy emas. Sifatli bitta loyiha 365 ta bo'sh commit'dan kuchli. Soxta commit qilma.

Open-source hissa: bitta haqiqiy PR (fork -> branch -> o'zgartirish -> Pull Request) - MapLibre, Tegola yoki QGIS plugin'iga kichik tuzatish ham bo'ladi. Bu jamoaviy ish qila olishingni isbotlaydi.

3 / GitLab - ko'pchilik chetda qoldiradi

Ko'p Yevropa, davlat va OSGeo ekotizimidagi GIS kompaniyalari GitLab ishlatadi. Asosiy loyihangni GitLab'ga mirror qilsang va u yerda ham CI/CD ko'rsatsang, o'sha bozorga ham ochilasan. GitLab Pages bilan portfolio sahifa ham joylash mumkin.

4 / LinkedIn - recruiterlar shu yerda qidiradi

Ko'p ish LinkedIn'da, e'lon chiqmasdan topiladi. Profiling kalit so'zlar bilan to'la bo'lsa, recruiter o'zi seni topadi.

Headline: rol + asosiy texnologiyalar (masalan "Geospatial Full-Stack Engineer / WebGIS / React/TS / PostGIS / Tegola"). About: 3-4 jumlada kimligingni va nima qila olishingni ayt. Featured: flagship loyiha + case study post. Skills to'ldir, recommendations so'ra. "Open to work" ni yoq.

5 / CV - 1 sahifa, natijaga yo'naltirilgan

Struktura: Header (ism, rol, aloqa, GitHub/LinkedIn havola) -> Summary (2 jumla) -> Skills (texnologiyalar) -> Projects (flagship birinchi) -> Experience -> Education.

Eng muhim qoida - XYZ formulasi: "Natijaga [X] erishdim, [Z] qilish orqali, [Y] bilan o'lchangan". Ya'ni har bullet: nima qilding + qanday + o'lchanadigan natija. Vazifa ro'yxati emas, ta'sir (impact).

ATS (avtomatik filtr): ko'p kompaniya CV'ni avval robot o'qiydi. Oddiy matnli, jadvalsiz/ustun-siz format ishlat, va e'londagi kalit so'zlarni (PostGIS, vector tiles, MapLibre, Docker) tabiiy joylashtir. Tailoring: har vakansiyaga CV'ni ozgina moslab tahrirla.

6 / Cover letter - qachon va qanday

Har doim shart emas, lekin so'ralsa yoki motivatsiyangni ko'rsatmoqchi bo'lsang - qisqa, 3 abzas: (1) nega aynan shu kompaniya, (2) nima qila olishing + bitta aniq dalil (loyihang), (3) qisqa yakun. Generic xat yuborma - har biri aniq kompaniyaga moslangan bo'lsin.

7 / Portfolio va case study

Eng kuchli isbot - bitta jonli, deploy qilingan loyiha + uning case study'si. Case study struktura: muammo -> yondashuv -> arxitektura -> qiyinchiliklar -> natija -> saboq. Bunga demo video (Loom/YouTube, 2-3 daq) qo'sh. Alohida portfolio sayti shart emas - GitHub README + jonli demo + texnik post yetarli.

8 / Interview voronkasi - bosqichma-bosqich

1) Recruiter screen - qisqa, motivatsiya va maosh kutilmasi. 2) Texnik suhbat - PostGIS/tile/Docker savollar. 3) Take-home - kichik vazifa: toza, ishlaydigan kod + README muhim (over-engineering emas). 4) Live coding - fikrlashni ovoz chiqarib ayt. 5) System design - kattaroq tizimni loyihalash. 6) Behavioral - STAR usuli (Situation, Task, Action, Result). Oxirida sen ularga savol ber (jamoa, texnologiya, o'sish) - bu qiziqishingni ko'rsatadi.

Har texnik suhbatda eng kuchli quroling - o'z loyihang. Uni muammo -> yechim -> natija shaklida 2 daqiqada tushuntirib bera olsang, suhbatning yarmi yutilgan.

9 / Maosh kelishuvi (negotiation)

Avval bozor narxini o'rgan (levels.fyi, mahalliy ma'lumot, hamjamiyat). Maosh kutilmasini so'rashsa, diapazon ber, yagona raqam emas. Taklif kelganda kelishuv normal - ko'pchilik birinchi taklifni qabul qiladi va pul yo'qotadi. Faqat asosiy maosh emas, umumiy paketni (bonus, ta'til, remote, o'sish) ko'r.

10 / Masofaviy va xalqaro ish

Remote uchun: English (ayniqsa yozma), aniq muloqot, vaqt mintaqasi moslashuvi. Platformalar: LinkedIn, remote ish doskalari, Upwork (boshlash uchun). English README va jonli demo bu yerda majburiy - chunki ko'pincha portfolio'ng birinchi (va yagona) taassurot bo'ladi.

11 / O'zbekiston GIS / tech ish bozori konteksti

Mahalliy bozorni tushunish arizani aniq nishonlashga yordam beradi. Talab uchta yo'nalishda ko'rinadi: davlat/kadastr, xususiy tech va xalqaro remote. Har birida kerakli ko'nikmalar biroz farq qiladi.

Kadastr / GeodeziyaQishloq xo'jaligi (agri-tech) Shahar rejalashtirishTelekom / infratuzilma Logistika / dostavkaDrone / aerofotosuratlar

Mahalliy talab qilinadigan ko'nikmalar: QGIS (deyarli hamma joyda), PostGIS/PostgreSQL, Python (avtomatizatsiya + processing), web-map stack (Leaflet/MapLibre), GDAL/OGR, va tobora ko'proq - vector tiles va cloud. Davlat/kadastr tomonida ko'pincha ArcGIS va milliy koordinata tizimlari (mahalliy proyeksiyalar, SK/UTM zonalari) talab qilinadi - bu FOSS stack ustiga qo'shimcha ustunlik.

Mahalliy ustunlik

Ko'pchilik nomzod faqat QGIS'ni biladi. Sen QGIS + PostGIS + Python + web stack ni birlashtira olsang, mahalliy bozorda darrov ajralib turasan - chunki bu "GIS mutaxassis" va "dasturchi" o'rtasidagi kamyob kesishma.

12 / Portfolio uchun mahalliy dataset g'oyalari

Xalqaro namuna dataset (masalan NYC taksi) ko'p ishlatilgan - siyqasi chiqqan. O'zbekiston datasetlari bilan qilingan loyiha esa mahalliy recruiter uchun tanish va yodda qoladi, xalqaro uchun esa "o'z mintaqasini biladi" degan signal beradi. Manbalar (barchasi ochiq):

OpenStreetMap Uzbekistan -> Geofabrik export (.osm.pbf) Toshkent / viloyat OSM -> binolar, yo'llar, POI data.gov.uz -> ochiq davlat datasetlari Sentinel / Landsat -> Copernicus, USGS (raster, agri) SRTM / Copernicus DEM -> relyef, balandlik GADM / Natural Earth -> ma'muriy chegaralar

Aniq loyiha g'oyalari:

1) Toshkent bino zichligi xaritasi - Geofabrik OSM'dan binolarni PostGIS'ga import, tuman bo'yicha zichlik/balandlik tahlili (window function), MapLibre'da choropleth. Butun stack'ni bir loyihada ko'rsatadi.

2) Yo'l tarmog'i va yaqinlik xizmati - "eng yaqin dorixona/maktab" (ST_DWithin + GIST index), route bo'yicha izohlar. Amaliy va tushunarli.

3) Agri-tech NDVI monitoring - Sentinel-2 rasteridan viloyat ekin maydonlari uchun NDVI hisoblash (Rasterio/GDAL), COG'ga aylantirish, vaqt bo'yicha o'zgarish. UZ agri-tech bozori uchun kuchli.

4) Ochiq transport / logistika - OSM yo'llari ustida isochrone (masofa/vaqt zonalari), dostavka radiusi vizualizatsiyasi.

Har loyihada README'ni ikki tilda (o'zbek + English) yozsang, ham mahalliy, ham xalqaro auditoriyaga ochilasan.

13 / Remote va xalqaro yo'llar

Geospatial - remote uchun kuchli soha: ish natijasi (xarita, API, pipeline) ochiq ko'rinadi va tekshiriladi. UZ'dan xalqaroga chiqishning amaliy yo'llari:

Yo'nalishlar: OSGeo ekotizimi (QGIS, GRASS, GeoServer, MapLibre) ochiq-kodli, hissa qo'shib nom chiqarish mumkin. Yevropa/AQSh GIS konsalting kompaniyalari remote GIS developer oladi. Global platformalar - Upwork/Toptal (boshlash), keyin to'g'ridan-to'g'ri LinkedIn orqali.

Majburiy shartlar: yozma English (README, PR, ticket), aniq async muloqot, jonli deploy qilingan demo, va GitHub'da toza tarix. Xalqaro suhbatda mahalliy dataset bilan qilingan loyiha "real muammoni yechganman" degan ishonchli hikoya beradi.

Ko'prik strategiyasi

Mahalliy loyiha bilan boshla (tez portfolio + aloqa), remote UZ/Yevropa kompaniyaga o't (English mashq), keyin to'liq xalqaro. Har bosqich keyingisiga isbot to'playdi. Maosh mintaqaga va vaqtga qarab o'zgaradi - bu yerda raqam yozmaymiz, o'zing joriy bozorni (levels.fyi, mahalliy hamjamiyat, LinkedIn e'lonlari) tekshir.

# Uzbekistan WebGIS Platform - Case Study

## Muammo
Million obyektli xaritani brauzerda silliq ko'rsatish kerak edi.

## Yondashuv
PostGIS -> Tegola vector tiles -> MapLibre, Docker bilan deploy.

## Qiyinchiliklar
- Tile sekin edi -> ST_Simplify + cache

## Natija
Tile latency 60% kamaydi, xarita 5x tez yuklanadi.

## Saboq
Index va caching - geospatial performance'ning kaliti.

code.title: "Eng qiyin muammo qanday edi?"
code.code:
S (Situation): Xarita 1M binoda juda sekin edi.
T (Task):      Yuklanishni production uchun maqbul qilish kerak edi.
A (Action):    Tile'larni profilladim, ST_Simplify va Tegola cache
               qo'shdim, GIST index'ni qayta ko'rdim.
R (Result):    Tile latency 60% kamaydi, foydalanuvchi shikoyati to'xtadi.

code.title: tayyorlanadigan savollar
code.code:
TEXNIK:
- 4326 va 3857 farqi? Qachon ST_Transform?
- ST_Intersects va ST_DWithin farqi? Qaysi index'dan foydalanadi?
- Vector tile nega kerak? z/x/y nima?
- Million obyekt sekin yuklansa, nimadan boshlaysan?
- Docker volume nega kerak? Nginx reverse proxy nima qiladi?

SYSTEM DESIGN:
- "O'zbekiston bo'ylab real-time taksi xaritasi" -> komponentlar:
  GPS ingest -> DB/cache -> WebSocket -> MapLibre; tile pipeline alohida.

SEN ULARGA BERADIGAN SAVOLLAR:
- Jamoa qanday ishlaydi? Texnologiya tanlovi kim tomonidan?
- Bu rolda 6 oyda muvaffaqiyat nimani anglatadi?

code.title: kutilma so'ralganda / taklif kelganda

 lekin umumiy paketga ham qarayman."

TAKLIF KELGANDA (kelishuv normal):

 hisobga olib, Z atrofini muhokama qila olamizmi?"

heading.p: Geofabrik export - portfolio loyihasi uchun.

code.title: get_uz_data.sh
code.code:
# O'zbekiston OSM ekstrakti (ochiq, bepul)
wget https://download.geofabrik.de/asia/uzbekistan-latest.osm.pbf

# Faqat Toshkent bbox'ini kesib olish (kichikroq, tezroq)
osmium extract \
  --bbox 69.1,41.2,69.5,41.4 \
  uzbekistan-latest.osm.pbf \
  -o tashkent.osm.pbf

# PostGIS'ga import (portfolio loyihang uchun asos)
osm2pgsql --create --slim --database gis --hstore tashkent.osm.pbf

# Endi: bino zichligi, yaqinlik xizmati yoki isochrone loyihasini qur.

quiz.q: Recruiter GitHub profilingda birinchi nimaga qaraydi?
quiz.w: Profil README va eng yaxshi 3-6 pinned loyiha - birinchi taassurot shu.

quiz.q: Profil README qaysi repo'da bo'lishi kerak?
a: username bilan bir xil nomli repo
quiz.w: username/username repo'sidagi README profil bosh sahifangda chiqadi.

quiz.q: Yaxshi CV uzunligi qancha?
quiz.w: 1 sahifa, natijaga yo'naltirilgan. Recruiter unga bir necha soniya qaraydi.

quiz.q: CV bulletida qaysi biri kuchliroq?
quiz.w: XYZ formulasi: natija + usul + o'lchanadigan raqam vazifa ro'yxatidan kuchli.

quiz.q: ATS nima va nega muhim?
a: CV'ni avval o'qiydigan avtomatik filtr - kalit so'z muhim
quiz.w: Ko'p kompaniya CV'ni avval robot saralaydi; sodda format + kalit so'zlar kerak.

quiz.q: Ko'p Yevropa va davlat GIS kompaniyalari qaysini ishlatadi?
quiz.w: GitLab - loyihangni mirror qilsang, o'sha bozorga ham ochilasan.

quiz.q: Behavioral savolga qaysi usul bilan javob berasan?
quiz.w: STAR javobni tuzilgan va ishonchli qiladi.

quiz.q: Interview'da loyihangni gapirganda nimaga urg'u berasan?
quiz.w: Nima muammoni, qanday yechding va qanday natija - eng kuchli hikoya shu.

quiz.q: Take-home topshirig'ida eng muhimi nima?
quiz.w: Over-engineering emas - ishlaydigan, o'qilishli yechim va README muhim.

quiz.q: Ish taklifi kelganda maosh bo'yicha to'g'ri yondashuv?
quiz.w: Kelishuv normal; ko'pchilik birinchi taklifni qabul qilib pul yo'qotadi. Umumiy paketga qara.
